consistency.class_match: The feature is correctly associated with the 'monk' class.
consistency.level_placement: Level 10 is a standard progression point for core class features.
consistency.name_and_slug: The name 'Purity of Body' accurately reflects the mechanics described.

quality.description_clarity: The description is concise and clearly states the mechanical benefits (immunity to disease and poison).
quality.completeness: The data accurately captures the feature's core mechanics.

mechanics.effect: Grants immunity to disease and poison.
mechanics.balance_assessment: This is a significant defensive upgrade, fitting for a mid-to-high-level class feature. Immunity to two common sources of debilitating effects (poison/disease) is strong but appropriate for level 10.
mechanics.design_pattern: Standard defensive progression feature for the Monk class.

analysis.suggestions: No modifications are necessary; the data is complete and accurate.
